description_long: This is a rustic, Western-themed bar interior featuring a wooden structure with exposed beams and a patterned wooden floor. The bar counter is centrally located, flanked by barrels, hay bales, and a life-sized cow statue, evoking a saloon atmosphere. The back wall is adorned with colorful flags, framed pictures, and a large 'SALOON' sign mounted above the entrance. The bar area includes shelves with bottles, glasses, and various bar equipment, while the walls display Western-themed decor. The space is partially enclosed by black walls on two sides, with the open area facing the saloon sign and entrance. The overall design emphasizes a cozy, immersive environment reminiscent of an Old West saloon.
description: A Western-style bar interior with wooden beams, patterned flooring, a central bar counter, and saloon-themed decor including hay bales, barrels, and a cow statue.
description_view_0: The view shows the bar from behind a solid black wall, with the wooden roof beams and some colorful flags visible above.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the saloon sign, cow statue, hay bales, and the open entrance area, providing a clear look at the bar's layout and decor.
description_view_2: A frontal view of the bar, showcasing the patterned floor, central bar counter, saloon sign, cow statue, and decorative elements on the back wall.
description_view_3: This side view reveals the bar's interior details, including the bar counter, shelving, and wall-mounted decor, with the cow statue and hay bales partially visible.
attribute_signage: Large, rustic wooden 'SALOON' sign with white painted letters, wall-mounted above the entrance, highly prominent and central to the theme.
attribute_entrance_type: Single open archway with no visible door, framed by wooden beams and flanked by hay bales and a cow statue.
